
```{r}


library(dplyr)

joined_dataset <- read.csv("combined_attendance.csv")



#calculated weighted average absences by multiplying each school's total population by their average absences measure
#then aggregated by school year and county
#calculated total students for each county and sum of weighted average absences for each county
#calculated each county's weighted average absences by dividing weighted sum by total student population
#reordered dataset by school year (increasing) and counties' weighted average absences (descending)

final_avg_absences <- joined_dataset |>
  mutate(weighted_absences = `Average...of.Absences` * School_Total) |>
  group_by(school_year, COUNTY) |>
  summarize(
    total_students = sum(School_Total, na.rm = TRUE),
    weighted_absences_sum = sum(weighted_absences, na.rm = TRUE),
    num_schools = n()
  ) |>
  mutate(county_avg_absences_weighted = weighted_absences_sum / total_students) |>
  arrange(school_year, desc(county_avg_absences_weighted))

#download final dataset
write.csv(final_avg_absences, "county_avg_absences.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
